description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 11th; Slot none; Price 58,000 gp; Weight 7 lbs. DESCRIPTION This staff is made of silver, with a shimmering sphere of mithral at either end. One end features a golden snake wrapped around the staff and cradling the larger of these two mithral spheres. The staff may be used as a weapon, functioning as a +2/+2 quarterstaff. It also grants a +2 enhancement bonus to Intelligence to whoever possesses it. These two attributes continue to function after all the charges are expended. It allows the use of the following spells: Bullâs strength (1 charge) Enlarge person (1 charge) Telekinesis (3 charges) Flesh to stone (4 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor, Craft Staff; Spells bullâs strength, enlarge person, flesh to stone, foxâs cunning, telekinesis; Cost 29,300 gp.
